ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size specification */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., 46, 48) */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "seat_hip" REAL /* Seat/Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "inside_length" INTEGER /* Inside length measurement in centimeters */,
  "outside_length" INTEGER /* Outside length measurement in centimeters */,
  "leg_opening" REAL /* Leg opening measurement in centimeters */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., jacket, pants) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., regular, petite, tall) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_type FOREIGN KEY ("size_type") REFERENCES size_types ("size_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_category FOREIGN KEY ("size_category") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product brand */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity for this size of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product-size association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product-size association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-size association being logged */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity changed (positive for additions, negative for deductions) */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., sale, restock) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for brand inquiries */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_types" (
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size type */,
  "size_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the size type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_turnover_rates" (
  "turnover_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover rate */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product-size */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Inventory turnover rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the turnover rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the turnover rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnover_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_turnover_rates_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_size_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "preference_rate" REAL /* Preference rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_size_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the size change */,
  "previous_size" TEXT /* Previous size */,
  "new_size" TEXT /* New size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
